ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number in which the transaction was included */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the transaction was processed */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Sender's address */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Receiver's address */,
  "from_is_contract" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sender is a contract (true/false) */,
  "to_is_contract" INTEGER /* Indicates if the receiver is a contract (true/false) */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction call (e.g., call, create) */,
  "calling_function" TEXT /* Function called in the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the transaction in ether */,
  "is_error" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., None for success, error message for failure) */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Amount of gas used by the transaction */,
  "gas_price" INTEGER /* Price of gas paid for the transaction */,
  "nonce" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction from a particular address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the transaction (e.g., success, pending, failed) */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the blockchain network */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Raw data sent with the transaction */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum amount of gas the transaction is allowed to use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_address FOREIGN KEY ("from_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_address FOREIGN KEY ("to_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the block was mined */,
  "miner_address" TEXT /* Address of the miner who mined the block */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions included in the block */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the block */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum amount of gas that can be used in the block */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Total gas used by all transactions in the block */,
  "parent_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the previous block */,
  "uncle_count" INTEGER /* Number of uncle blocks included in the block */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the blockchain network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Blockchain address (either sender or receiver) */,
  "is_contract" INTEGER /* Indicates if the address is a contract (true/false) */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the address was created */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the address */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions involving the address */,
  "last_active" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last transaction involving the address */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., user, contract, miner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "access_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smart_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smart contract */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the smart contract */,
  "creation_block" INTEGER /* Block number at which the contract was created */,
  "creator_address" TEXT /* Address of the user that deployed the contract */,
  "interface" TEXT /* Interface of the smart contract, if applicable */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Source code of the smart contract */,
  "abi" TEXT /* Application Binary Interface (ABI) of the smart contract */,
  "creation_transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that created the smart contract */,
  "last_updated" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last update to the smart contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_contracts_creator_address FOREIGN KEY ("creator_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_contracts_creation_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("creation_transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that caused the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message generated by the transaction */,
  "error_block" INTEGER /* Block number in which the error occurred */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code representing the type of error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., revert, timeout, out of gas) */,
  "error_trace" TEXT /* Detailed trace of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions processed */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of all transactions */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average transaction value */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number associated with the summary */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum transaction value in the block */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum transaction value in the block */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median transaction value in the block */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of transaction values in the block */,
  "total_gas_used" INTEGER /* Total gas used by transactions in the block */,
  "average_gas_price" REAL /* Average gas price of transactions in the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_summaries_block_number FOREIGN KEY ("block_number") REFERENCES blocks ("block_number")
)
